english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا عَلِيُّ يَا عَظِيمُ،  يَا غَفُورُ يَا رَحِيمُ،
english translation text: O Elevated, O Mighty, O Forgiver, O Merciful.

arabic text: أَنْتَ الرَّبُّ الْعَظِيمُ الَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ
english translation text: You are the Mighty Lord, nothing is of comparison to Him.
And He is the All-­Hearing, the All-­Seeing.

arabic text: وَهذَا شَهْرٌ عَظَّمْتَهُ وَكَرَّمْتَهُ وَشَرَّفْتَهُ وَفَضَّلْتَهُ عَلَى الشُّهُورِ،
english translation text: This is a month which You have exalted, honored, preferred and excelled over all other months.

arabic text: وَهُوَ الشَّهْرُ الَّذِي فَرَضْتَ صِيَامَهُ عَلَيَّ،
english translation text: It is the month in which You have made fasting obligatory on me,

arabic text: وَهُوَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنَ
english translation text: and it is the month of Ramadhan, in which You sent down the Qur’an,

arabic text: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ الْهُدَى وَالْفُرْقَانِ
english translation text: a guidance for mankind, In it are clear signs of guidance and distinction. (2:185)
You have placed in it the night of Ordinance,
and made it better than a thousand months. (97:2)

arabic text: فَيَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَلا يُمَنُّ عَلَيْكَ
english translation text:
O One who favours,
and none favours You,

arabic text: مُنَّ عَلَيَّ بِفَكَاكِ رَقَبَتِي مِنَ النَّارِ فِي مَنْ تَمُنُّ عَلَيْهِ
english translation text: favour me by saving me from the fire, amongst the ones whom You favour,

arabic text: وَأَدْخِلْنِي الْجَنَّةَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
english translation text: and make me enter Heaven by Your mercy, O the most Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
